title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
